name: HTS_WORK_PATTERNS_B_
description: Table to store the work pattern information. Work patterns will be used to assign to workers.

columns.Name: WORK_PATTERN_ID
columns.Comments: Unique system generated identifier for a work pattern.

columns.Name: WORK_PATTERN_ALTCD
columns.Comments: Work pattern alternate code. Unique and non-translatable.

columns.Name: WORK_SHIFT_TYPE
columns.Comments: Identifies the type of shift associated to this work pattern.

columns.Name: WORK_PATTERN_TYPE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of the work pattern type associated to this work pattern.

columns.Name: TEMPLATE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Identifies whether work pattern is considered as a template.

columns.Name: REPEAT_CYCLE
columns.Comments: Repeating cycle.

columns.Name: REPEAT_NUM
columns.Comments: Length of work pattern in repeating period unit.

columns.Name: START_DAY_OF_PATTERN
columns.Comments: Identifies the day on which work pattern starts.

columns.Name: NON_WORKING_CYCLES
columns.Comments: Identifies the non-working cycles in the work pattern stored as a single value with comma as a separator.

columns.Name: WORK_DAY_DEF_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of the workday definition associated to this work pattern.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Enterprise

columns.Name: AUDIT_ACTION_TYPE_
columns.Comments: Action Type - have values like INSERT, UPDATE and DELETE.

columns.Name: AUDIT_CHANGE_BIT_MAP_
columns.Comments: Used to store a bit map of 1s and 0s for each column in the table.

columns.Name: AUDIT_IMPERSONATOR_
columns.Comments: Original Impersonator User.
